(x) “trust” means a trust established under the Indian Trusts Act, 1882 or under an Act
of Parliament or State Legislation;
23[(y) “unit” means beneficial interest of the investors in the Alternative Investment Fund
or a scheme of the Alternative Investment Fund and may be fully or partly paid up.
Explanation.─ For the purpose of this clause, partly paid up units shall represent
the portion of committed capital invested by the investor in Alternative Investment
Fund or scheme of the Alternative Investment Fund;]
heading: Section 4 of the Companies Act, 1956;”.
